name: iCloud Sync

toast.pull: Loaded iCloud data into this device.
toast.push: iCloud snapshot overwritten with local data.
toast.conflict: Sync conflict resolved. Latest version saved.

error.origin: This domain is not allowed to access CloudKit. Check CloudKit Dashboard settings.
error.config: CloudKit is not configured. Check environment variables.
error.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site.
error.timeout: iCloud connection timed out. Please try again.

notice: Your data is stored in your private iCloud container.
unavailable: CloudKit sync is unavailable because the required environment variables are not configured.
